digest.title: Aurora 1.5: Extending open foundation models for weather and Earth-system applications
digest.tldr: 5 adds 22 more variables, hourly temporal resolution, and probabilistic ensemble forecasting to the Aurora foundation model, making it more useful for real-world weather, climate, and energy applications.  5: Extending…
